features.title: Constellation View
features.description: View all active balloons in real-time with an hourly snapshot selector for historical data analysis.

features.title: Individual Balloon Tracking
features.description: Track a single balloon's trajectory over 24 hours with altitude, velocity, ascent/descent rates, and weather conditions.

features.title: Satellite & Global Wind Flow Overlay
features.description: Toggle between satellite and standard map views while visualizing real-time global wind circulation patterns, including jet streams and cyclonic activity.

features.title: Filter Timezone-Based Weather Balloons & Animate Trajectory
features.description: Select balloons based on timezones and visualize their animated movement over the past 24 hours, tracking their shifting positions across regions in real-time.

features.title: Wind Velocity Patterns & Data Log (Old)
features.description: Visualize balloon wind speeds, directions, and trajectory paths with an interactive data log popup displaying altitude, ascent rates, and other key telemetry details.

features.title: Flight Analytics Chart
features.description: Analyze altitude, wind speed, ascent rate, acceleration, and ground temperature trends to study atmospheric variations and balloon trajectory behavior.

features.title: Data Logger (Draggable & Responsive)
features.description: Enhanced UI with drag & resize support, displaying altitude, wind speed, ascent rate, and temperature over 24 hours.

features.title: 🌡️ Temperature Heatmap Along Balloon's Trajectory
features.description: Visualize ground-level temperature variations along the balloon's path, with an overlaid heatmap representing real-time atmospheric conditions.
